references.text: Kato, M & D Darnaedi. 1988. Taxonomic and Phytogeographic Relationships of Diplazium flavoviride, D. pycnocarpon, and Diplaziopsis. American Fern Journal 78: 77-85.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 2 March 2025

species.citation: (Blume) C.Chr. , Index Filic. (C.Chr) (1905) 227 ; Kato & Darnaedi, Amer. Fern J. (1988) 77; ≡ Diplazium javanicum (Blume) Makino , Bot. Mag. (Tokyo) 20 (1906) 85; ≡ Asplenium javanicum Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 175.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Bhutan, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, China, India, Japan, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Vietnam. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Benguet, Kalinga, Laguna, Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS.
